seoTitle: Tenindewa vs The Lakes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Tenindewa and The Lakes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Tenindewa vs The Lakes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Tenindewa and The Lakes.
heading: Tenindewa vs The Lakes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Tenindewa, Western Australia and The Lakes, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Tenindewa has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to The Lakes (39/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Tenindewa or The Lakes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Tenindewa has a flood risk score of 45/100, while The Lakes scores 28/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Tenindewa scores 34/100 for bushfire risk. The Lakes scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Tenindewa or The Lakes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Tenindewa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.3% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
